title: GE HealthCare Technologies (GEHC) lags Q1 earnings estimates
body: GE HealthCare Technologies (GEHC) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.99 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.07 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.01 per share a year ago.
